title: Brain Placement & Architecture Recon
summary: Reconnaissance mission that selected the hybrid Brain placement: UI in Minerva Console, content in content/brain, and a typed loader under features/brain.

title: Create Brain Harness and Static Shell
summary: Scaffolded the Brain content tree, registries, feature module, console routes, sidebar grouping, and initial read-only shell.

title: Brain CI Guardrails
summary: Added the Brain guardrail script and CI workflow checks to enforce Brain boundaries and registry completeness.

title: Fix TypeScript CI Check
summary: Adjusted the TypeScript CI check after the static shell and guardrails landed on the Brain shell branch.

title: Brain Markdown Reader and Detail Routes
summary: Added Markdown document rendering and generic Brain detail routes for registry entries with linked source documents.

title: Brain Inbox Capture CLI
summary: Added a local CLI for capturing raw outputs into the Git-backed Brain inbox with registry updates and handoff documentation.

title: Brain Search and Tag Index
summary: Added local read-only search across Brain registries and Markdown documents, plus a tag index page.

title: Brain Promotion Workflow
summary: Added a local promotion CLI that turns reviewed inbox items into approved Brain knowledge without UI write paths.

title: Brain Mission Control Ledger
summary: Create a Git-backed mission ledger so Brain missions are first-class read-only knowledge in Minerva Core Brain.

title: Relations Map
summary: Added a Brain relations map deriving outgoing relations, incoming backlinks, and broken references from registry related arrays, with read-only views and a CLI/guardrail relation check.

title: Brain Audit & Hardening Pass
summary: Audit of Brain v0 with minimal, safe fixes: added triaged to guardrail inbox statuses, made brain-new-mission emit date-only YYYY-MM-DD timestamps, and corrected the stale MCB-0007 ledger entry to completed.

title: Mission Ledger Completion Pass
summary: Registered the previously unrecorded MCB-0008 Relations Map mission in the Brain mission ledger, marking it completed and setting its unverifiable branch/agent to unknown.

title: Register MCB-0009 in Mission Ledger
summary: Registers MCB-0009 in the Mission Ledger with verified PR, commit, and agent metadata; branch remains unknown because no reliable current branch evidence is available.

title: Ledger Integrity Pack
summary: Hardened the Mission Ledger against drift: registered MCB-0010 and MCB-0011, added guardrail CHECK 7 (every mission doc must have a registry entry), documented the unverifiable-field convention, and corrected the contradictory MCB-0011 summary.

title: CI Gate Repair
summary: Repaired the CI quality gate by fixing the broken YAML indentation in the typecheck job of .github/workflows/ci.yml so the TypeScript check runs as a real blocking step again.

title: Minimal AI Mission Loop Bootstrap
summary: Creates the minimal Markdown-first AI mission loop structure for coordinating agents through mission folders, reports, templates, roles, protocol, and operator guidance.
